summary: Docker build process failed when attempting to download the Nydus binary using wget from GitHub. The wget command exited with code 1, preceded by network fetch failures with 'context canceled' errors when pulling container image layers from quay.io and other registries.
root_cause: wget command to download Nydus binary from GitHub failed with exit code 1: 'process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1'. Multiple preceding fetch operations also failed with 'context canceled' errors when retrieving image layers from quay.io.

evidence.quote: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: Explicit command failure: the wget download of Nydus binary from GitHub failed, which is the direct cause of the build failure.

evidence.quote: error="failed to do request: Get \"https://cdn01.quay.io/quayio-production-s3/...\": context canceled"
evidence.reason: Network-level fetch failure with context cancellation, indicating transient network issues during layer retrieval.

evidence.quote: error="failed to do request: Get \"https://quay.io/v2/minio/minio/blobs/...\": context canceled"
evidence.reason: Additional context canceled error on quay.io fetch, reinforcing network connectivity issues during the build.

evidence.quote: level=error msg="/moby.buildkit.v1.Control/Solve returned error: rpc error: code = Canceled desc = context canceled"
evidence.reason: buildkit solver returned a context canceled error, indicating the build was terminated due to network or transient failures.

suggested_fix: Investigate network connectivity from the CI runner to external sources (GitHub, quay.io). Retry the build as this appears to be a transient network issue. If the problem persists, verify that the Nydus release version is available at the GitHub URL and that the CI runner has unrestricted internet access to download external dependencies during container builds.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
